title: Authors and Citation
text: Perl EF (2026). FIMSPkgdownTemplate: FIMS Pkgdown Template. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://github.com/noaa-fims/fims-pkgdown-template.
code: @Manual{,   title = {FIMSPkgdownTemplate: FIMS Pkgdown Template},   author = {Elizabeth F. Perl},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://github.com/noaa-fims/fims-pkgdown-template}, }

title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: GitHub Template Repository providing shared pkgdown theme files NOAA-FIMS R packages.

title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: pkgdown/extra.css — shared NOAA-FIMS CSS stylesheet (fonts, colours, navbar, footer) pkgdown/favicon/ — FIMS favicon set (.ico, .svg, .png, web-app manifests) pkgdown/FIMS_PKGDOWN_TEMPLATE_VERSION — version marker used sync workflow .github/workflows/sync-fims-pkgdown-template.yml — workflow keep files date downstream packages (see Sync workflow ) pkgdown/_pkgdown.yml.example — starter config can copy customise

what: What downstream packages must maintain themselves
title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: downstream package responsible : pkgdown/_pkgdown.yml — site URL, navbar structure, reference index, article list, authors block, etc. sync workflow never overwrite file. package-specific files vignettes. Use pkgdown/_pkgdown.yml.example repo starting point.

previous_headings: Adopting the template in an existing package
what: Option A — Use GitHub’s “Use this template” button
title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: Click Use template → Create new repository template repo page. copies files new repo automatically. Copy pkgdown/_pkgdown.yml.example pkgdown/_pkgdown.yml customise package. Delete pkgdown/_pkgdown.yml.example longer need .

previous_headings: Adopting the template in an existing package
what: Option B — Add pkgdown files to an existing package manually
title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: Run following root package repository: copy customise pkgdown/_pkgdown.yml.example pkgdown/_pkgdown.yml.
code: TEMPLATE_REPO="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NOAA-FIMS/fims-pkgdown-template/main"  mkdir -p pkgdown/favicon  # CSS curl -sSL "${TEMPLATE_REPO}/pkgdown/extra.css" -o pkgdown/extra.css  # Favicons for f in apple-touch-icon.png favicon-96x96.png favicon.ico favicon.svg \           site.webmanifest web-app-manifest-192x192.png web-app-manifest-512x512.png; do   curl -sSL "${TEMPLATE_REPO}/pkgdown/favicon/${f}" -o "pkgdown/favicon/${f}" done  # Version marker curl -sSL "${TEMPLATE_REPO}/pkgdown/FIMS_PKGDOWN_TEMPLATE_VERSION" \      -o pkgdown/FIMS_PKGDOWN_TEMPLATE_VERSION  # Sync workflow mkdir -p .github/workflows curl -sSL "${TEMPLATE_REPO}/.github/workflows/sync-fims-pkgdown-template.yml" \      -o .github/workflows/sync-fims-pkgdown-template.yml

title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: File: .github/workflows/sync-fims-pkgdown-template.yml workflow intended run downstream repos, template repo .

title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: Checks downstream repo. Checks NOAA-FIMS/fims-pkgdown-template default branch temporary directory. pkgdown/extra.css pkgdown/favicon/** pkgdown/FIMS_PKGDOWN_TEMPLATE_VERSION touch pkgdown/_pkgdown.yml. changes, opens Pull Request default branch clear title description. changes, exits silently.

title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: workflow requests contents: write pull-requests: write via permissions block, satisfied automatic GITHUB_TOKEN repositories.

what: Opting out or disabling the sync workflow
title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: disable automatic sync downstream repo: Disable workflow via GitHub Actions UI (Actions → sync-fims-pkgdown-template → ⋯ → Disable workflow), Delete workflow file .github/workflows/sync-fims-pkgdown-template.yml repo. can still use template files without automatic sync workflow simply keeping files without workflow.

what: Create a gh-pages branch to deploy pkgdown site
title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: initialize template repository add files existing repository need copy paste following code terminal/git bash create empty gh-pages branch. Github automatically detect gh-pages branch created Settings > Pages switch publishing Pages gh-pages. step, want go Actions > call-update-pkgdown (side nav) look Run workflow button towards top right screen click re-run pkgdown site build deploy.
code: # from your repo working directory git checkout --orphan gh-pages git rm -rf . 2>/dev/null || true  # add something so the branch isn’t totally empty touch .nojekyll git add .nojekyll git commit -m "Initialize gh-pages branch"  git push -u origin gh-pages

title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: just created new FIMS package, eventually PR [FIMS website repo] need review add following: - Appropriate tags - Hex logo (available)

title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: pkgdown build fails, please see ghactions4r page details adding ubuntu libraries additional arguments .github/workflow/call-update-pkgdown.yml file

title: FIMS Pkgdown Template
text: pkgdown/FIMS_PKGDOWN_TEMPLATE_VERSION contains current template version (e.g. 0.1.0). sync workflow opens PR, version visible PR title branch name, making easy track version template package using.
